parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, message: 'Job created and pending human review.', jobId: $json.jobId, filePath: $json.filePath, status: $json.status, data: $json.job } }}

meta.description: Receives GPT/gateway video requests, builds a schema-compliant job (see docs/JOB_SCHEMA.md) and persists it to NVF_JOB_DIR (default /media/scripts). Does not render or publish. Requires NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=fs,path,crypto on the n8n container.
